question.label: Thread follow
question.name: name wins, always — can you say more about what that means for you right now?
question.description: Runtime thread-follow injected because planner did not follow substantive answer.

answer: Feedback has helped, though I still miss consistency under time pressure.

assessment.note: He says feedback is helping but names a specific recurring miss—consistency under time pressure—which confirms a clear standards gap while staying engaged with improving it.

new_queue.label: Time pressure misses
new_queue.name: Under time pressure, what specifically starts to slip in your work?

new_queue.label: Concrete examples
new_queue.name: Which recent piece of work best shows your current quality bar?

new_queue.label: Feedback translated
new_queue.name: What changed in your day-to-day after the last round of feedback?

new_queue.label: Quality misses
new_queue.name: Where do you think your work most often misses the bar?

new_queue.label: Working definition
new_queue.name: How do you decide when a design is ready to ship?

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: What would you like to have changed by our next check-in?

history.answer_excerpt: I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.
Feedback has helped, though I still miss consistency under time pressure.
